human_actions_pending.context: Godot compiles shaders at runtime; visual + flight correctness (galaxy discs, FTL transit, SOI entry, pop-free Star/Galaxy handoff) can only be confirmed in-game. 7 items tracked in 03-UAT.md.

decisions.decision: Galaxy positions/SOI authored in metres (Galaxy2_Z=2.4e22, Galaxy3_X/Z=1.27e22, SOI=5e20); constants renamed off the misleading *_UniZ names
decisions.rationale: AddGameObject takes its Double3 position and soiMeters in metres; the old Universe-unit values placed galaxies ~1e16x too close and flooded the sky

decisions.decision: Galaxy disc tangent basis built from the galaxy direction + front-hemisphere gate (dot(EYEDIR,gdir)>0); disc_normal tilt dropped (face-on)
decisions.rationale: disc_normal ~world-up collapsed the disc into a sky-spanning ring and the projection ghosted onto the antipode; a view-direction basis is always well-conditioned. Tilt deferred as tech debt

next_action: Run /gsd-verify-work 03 to walk the 7 UAT play-test items; mark items 1 and 3 (galaxy visibility) as passed since the debug fix already addressed them.
context_notes: Phase 03 implementation + verification + a debug session are all complete and committed (HEAD d117cf6). Working tree clean except pre-existing untracked .planning/research/.cache/*.json. Phase is NOT yet marked complete — it sits at human-verification (03-UAT.md). The reported sky-flood bug is fixed and user-verified in-game (debug session galaxy-sky-disc-antipode, status paused/fixed-and-verified). Two tech-debt todos were spun off (galaxy disc tilt; thrust-zero at galaxy SOI exit) and live in .planning/todos/pending/. The thrust-zero debt overlaps UAT item 5 (intergalactic transit) — expect it to surface during that play-test.
